title: Security Hardening Policy
required_training_roles: DevOps Engineer, Database Administrator, Security Analyst

sections.heading: Database Hardening
sections.text: Restrict access to databases based on user roles and context in accordance with the Access Control Policy. All database instances must enforce encryption at rest and in transit. Default credentials must be changed immediately upon deployment.

sections.heading: Network Segmentation
sections.text: All production environments must be segmented from development and staging networks. Firewall rules must follow least-privilege principles and be reviewed quarterly.

sections.heading: Unacceptable Behaviour
sections.text: Unacceptable behaviour includes failing to conduct proper audits, bypassing automated configuration processes, sharing credentials, and disabling security controls without authorization.
sections.human_instructions: Review daily log configurations quarterly during regular team audits. Document all exceptions in the risk register.
